updates.title: Amazon package delivered
updates.content: Your package with the wireless mouse has been left at the reception.

updates.title: Annual school fee circular published
updates.content: Term 2 fee structure is available. Payment deadline is July 10.

updates.title: Weekend family lunch plan changed
updates.content: Lunch at grandparents' house moved from Sunday to Saturday at 1:00 PM.

updates.title: Local power outage announcement
updates.content: Maintenance scheduled for Thursday between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM.
